<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Reference; use phpDocumentor\Reflection\Fqsen as RealFqsen; /** * Fqsen reference used by {@see \phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\See} */ final class Fqsen implements Reference { private RealFqsen $fqsen; public function __construct(RealFqsen $fqsen) { $this->fqsen = $fqsen; } /** * @return string string representation of the referenced fqsen */ public function __toString(): string { return (string) $this->fqsen; } }
